parts.text: Laptops under $1000

I found the **ProBook Laptop 15** for $999.99, which is a high-performance laptop with an Intel i7 processor. It fits your criteria of being under $1000.

Would you like to know more about it?
Show me products under $100

I cannot directly search for all "products" under a certain price. Please specify what type of product you are looking for (e.g., "laptops under $100", "headphones under $100"). I can then check for options within your budget.
Tell me about product PROD-001

The ProBook Laptop 15 (PROD-001) is a high-performance electronics product. It features an Intel Core i7-12700H processor, 16GB DDR5 RAM, and a 512GB NVMe SSD. It costs $999.99 and comes with a 2-year warranty.

It has an average rating of 4.5 stars from 234 reviews. Recent reviews highlight its excellent performance and suitability for coding.

There are 45 units in stock, with 10 in the EU, 15 in US-East, and 20 in US-West warehouses.
Details for PROD-002

The Wireless Headphones Pro (PROD-002) are premium noise-canceling wireless headphones. They feature 40mm drivers, 30 hours of battery life, and active noise-canceling. They are priced at $199.99 and have a great rating of 4.7 stars from 512 reviews.

We have 120 units in stock, with 40 in US-East, 50 in US-West, and 30 in the EU. Customers praise them for their excellent noise-canceling and suitability for travel. They come with a 1-year warranty.
